name: 03. Discord File Upload v2 - Hi Pages Lead

nodes.name: React with an emoji to a message

parameters.text:
=HiPages parsing rules (IMPORTANT):

You are analyzing this image:
{{ $json.image.proxyURL }}

Extract customer details directly from the text visible in the image.

Instructions:

Use ONLY what is clearly readable in the image.
Do NOT guess.
Do NOT hallucinate.
If a field is not clearly present/readable, return an empty string "".

Respond with JSON only.
Do NOT wrap the JSON in markdown.
Do NOT include explanations.
Do NOT include any keys other than those in the output JSON below.

Name:
If a full name is visible, put the first word into "firstName" and the last word into "lastName".
If only one name is visible, put it in "firstName" and leave "lastName" as "".
Do NOT use business names unless clearly identifying a person.

Phone:
If a mobile number is visible, put it in "mobileNumber".
If a landline is visible, put it in "phoneNumber".

Email:
If clearly visible, put it in "emailAddress".

Address:
If a full street address is visible, put the full street address into "address".
If only suburb/locality is visible, put that into "address".
Always fill "suburb" if suburb/locality is visible.
If "address" contains only suburb/locality (no street), copy it into "suburb".

State classification (ONLY use one of these values):
"NSW"
"Brisbane"
"Gold Coast"

Rules:
If suburb/postcode clearly belongs to NSW → "NSW"
If suburb/postcode clearly belongs to Brisbane metro → "Brisbane"
If suburb/postcode clearly belongs to Gold Coast region → "Gold Coast"
If not confidently determined → ""

Postcode:
Fill "postalCode" only if clearly visible.

IdLikeToGetMyProjectUnderway:
Only fill "IdLikeToGetMyProjectUnderway" if this exact field (or a clearly equivalent label like "Start by" / "Start date" / "When to start") is visible in the image.
Examples:
- If the image shows "Start by ASAP" → set "IdLikeToGetMyProjectUnderway" = "ASAP"
- If the image shows a date/time → copy it exactly
If not visible, return "".

Quantity:
Only fill "Quantity" if a quantity (number of items/doors/windows/etc.) is clearly visible in the image.
Copy the quantity exactly as shown (e.g., "2", "two", "2 doors", "2x").
If not visible, return "".

Enquiry field (MANDATORY):
The "enquiry" field MUST contain the job description text extracted from the image.
Do NOT summarize.
Do NOT reword.
You may lightly clean obvious OCR formatting issues (extra spaces/line breaks) but do NOT change the wording.
If no usable job details are visible, return "" for "enquiry".

Return EXACTLY this JSON structure (no extra keys):

{
  "firstName": "",
  "lastName": "",
  "mobileNumber": "",
  "phoneNumber": "",
  "emailAddress": "",
  "address": "",
  "state": "",
  "suburb": "",
  "postalCode": "",
  "enquiry": "",
  "IdLikeToGetMyProjectUnderway": "",
  "Quantity": ""
}

schema.id: I’d Like To Get My Project Underway
schema.displayName: I’d Like To Get My Project Underway

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "client_first_name": "{{ $json.firstName }}",
  "client_last_name": "{{ $json.lastName }}",
  "client_mobile": "{{ $json.mobileNumber }}",
  "client_work_number": "{{ $json.phoneNumber }}",
  "client_home_number": "",
  "client_email": "{{ $json.emailAddress }}",
  "client_address": "{{ $json.address }} {{ $json.suburb }}",
  "client_suburb": "{{ $json.suburb }}",
  "client_state": "{{ $json.state }}",
  "client_postal": "{{ $json.postalCode }}",
  "client_region": "{{ $json.state }}",
  "enquiry_notes": "{{ $json.enquiry }}",
  "other_contact_details": "",
  "client_lead_source": "HiPages",

  "opportunity_title": "{{ $json.suburb }} {{ $json.state }} {{ $json.postalCode }}",
  "opportunity_how_hear_us": "HiPages",
  "sales_pipeline": "New Lead - HiPages",
  "assign_to": "windowrevival+1@gmail.com",
  "opportunity_product_interest": ["Repairs"],
  "opportunity_contact_name": "{{ $json.firstName }} {{ $json.lastName }}",
  "opportunity_mobile_number": "{{ $json.mobileNumber }}",
  "opportunity_work_number": "{{ $json.phoneNumber }}",
  "opportunity_home_number": "",
  "opportunity_address": "{{ $json.address }}",
  "opportunity_state": "{{ $json.state }}",
  "opportunity_suburb": "{{ $json.suburb }}",
  "opportunity_postcode": "{{ $json.postalCode }}",
  "opportunity_email": "{{ $json.emailAddress }}",

  "opportunity_description": "{{ $json.enquiry }}",
  "opportunity_next_action": "",
  "opportunity_status": "Hot",
  "opportunity_estimated_revenue": 0,
  "opportunity_percent_chance": "50%",
  "opportunity_follow_up_date": "{{
    (() => {
      const tz = 'Australia/Brisbane';
      let date = new Date();

      date.setDate(date.getDate() + 1);

      while (date.getDay() === 0 || date.getDay() === 6) {
        date.setDate(date.getDate() + 1);
      }

      const formatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA', {
        timeZone: tz,
        year: 'numeric',
        month: '2-digit',
        day: '2-digit'
      });

      const parts = formatter.formatToParts(date);
      const yyyy = parts.find(p => p.type === 'year').value;
      const mm = parts.find(p => p.type === 'month').value;
      const dd = parts.find(p => p.type === 'day').value;

      return `${yyyy}-${mm}-${dd} 08:00:00`;
    })()
  }}",
  "projected_revenue": 0,
  "net_promoter_score": 0,
  "net_promoter_comment": "net promoter",
  "opportunity_same_as_contact_details": "no",
  "create_job": "no",

  "job_event": "job_event",
  "job_technician": "chris", 
  "job_start_date": "2026-03-26 7:00:00", 
  "job_end_date": "2026-03-26 16:00:00", 
  "projected_sales": 1000, 
  "actual_sales": 1500, 
  "duration": 2, 
  "man_job": 2, 
  "queue": 2, 
  "type": "Fixed", 
  "sms_status": "Send sms reminder", 
  "schedule_status": "To Be Confirmed", 
  "job_status": "Job Completed", 
  "services": "Repairs",
  "job_description": "job_description", 
  "dsp_note": "dsp note", 
  "work_done": "work done", 
  "work_stil_to_be_done": "work still done" 
}

main.node: React with an emoji to a message
Append or update row in sheet
